item.title: Zenyum Sonic Electric Toothbrush with Zenyum Water Flosser Pro (Black/White)

paragraph_list.text: 𝐈𝐧𝐜𝐥𝐮𝐝𝐞𝐬: 1 x Zenyum Water Flosser Pro (Black/White), 1 x ZenyumSonic Electric Toothbrush 2.0 (Black/White)
𝐙𝐞𝐧𝐲𝐮𝐦 𝐖𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐟𝐥𝐨𝐬𝐬𝐞𝐫 𝐏𝐫𝐨
Flossing made easy, with no strings attached. Experience a sensational clean that makes the tedious chore of flossing less of a hassle and a lot more fun.
➩ 𝐁𝐞𝐧𝐞𝐟𝐢𝐭𝐬:
•  Powered by high pulse technology (1400-1800 times/min) ➜ continuous and efficient cleaning, ensuring that it reaches deep between teeth.

•  Personalized smart experience ➜ equipped with an OLED display with 5 modes to choose from, suiting all preferences and needs. Try out the unique DIY mode to set water pressure to your own comfort level (especially great for sensitive-concern users).
•  More variation and flexibility ➜ 4 Jet Tips plus 360 degree tip rotation allows it to reach every area of your mouth.
➩ 𝐅𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐞𝐬:
•  Impressive battery life  ➜ 1 single charge = 30 days of continual usage, perfect for travel.
•  Fuss-free & water resistant ➜ High capacity water tank (280ml), minimizes the need for constant refills. Suitable for use in the shower!
•  30-day money back guarantee & 1 Year Warranty ➜ risk-free & peace of mind
ZenyumSonic™ Electric Toothbrush 2.0
ZenyumSonic™ 2.0 is the upgraded fan-favourite — redesigned with more power, more precision, and smarter features for your best brush yet.
From deeper cleans to longer battery life, it’s your daily routine, leveled up.
→ Smart Features, Compact Power
- 5 Smart Brushing Modes (incl. Gum Massage)
- Up to 45,000 VPM
- 90 Days Battery Life* - 3x longer life
- IPX8 Waterproof
- 4-Hour USB-C Charging
- Smart Brushing Timer
- DuPont Bristles for a Superior Clean
*Average battery lifespan, based on 2 min usage twice a day, results may vary.
→ Why It’s Better (vs. V 1.0)
✓ 5 brushing modes (previously 3 modes) ➜ Clean, White, Deep Clean, Gentle and Gum Massage
✓ 45,000 vibrations/min (previously 33,000 VPM) ➜ For a deeper, dentist-like clean with every use
✓ 90 days battery life (previously 28 days) ➜ For a longer, lasting power
✓ Upgraded to IPX8 Waterproof (previously IPX7) ➜ Safe for shower use and full submersion
✓ Only 4 Hours to Fully Charge (previously 14 hours) ➜ Faster charge, more convenience
→ How to use:
- Squeeze a pea-sized amount of toothpaste onto your ZenyumSonic™ Toothbrush.
- Press the power button once to turn the toothbrush on or off.
- To switch modes, press the power button repeatedly to cycle through the five brushing modes.
- Move the brush head slowly & gently around your teeth.
- Change sides every 30 seconds with each sound alert.
- Once 2 mins (3 mins for Deep Clean mode) of brushing is up, rinse clean with water.
→ Charging Your ZenyumSonic™:
- Rotate the compartment cover (at the bottom of the toothbrush) counterclockwise to access the USB-C charging port.
- Ensure the port is completely dry before plugging in.
- Blinking mode icons indicate charging is in progress; fully lit icons indicate charging is complete.
- Charging takes ~4 hours. Once done, unplug and rotate the cover clockwise to close.
→ Pro Tips:
- Rinse the brush head after each use.
- Wipe the handle base dry with a soft cloth and allow to air dry.
- Store in a clean, dry place away from direct sunlight.
- Replace the brush head every 3 months.
Note:
- Device is only compatible with ZenyumSonic™ Brush Head Refill and ZenyumSonic™ Gentle Clean Brush Head Refill.
- NOT compatible with ZenyumSonic™ Spark Brush Head and ZenyumSonic™ Go Brush Head.
→ Customer Service:
Issues or concerns? Contact us through chat and click on Shop Agent.

ZenyumSonic™ 2.0 is the upgraded fan-favourite — redesigned with more power, more precision, and smarter features for your best brush yet.
From deeper cleans to longer battery life, it’s your daily routine, leveled up.

- 90 Days Battery Life* - 3x longer life

*Average battery lifespan, based on 2 min usage twice a day, results may vary.

- Press the power button once to turn the toothbrush on or off.

- Move the brush head slowly & gently around your teeth.
- Change sides every 30 seconds with each sound alert.
- Once 2 mins (3 mins for Deep Clean mode) of brushing is up, rinse clean with water.

→ Charging Your ZenyumSonic™: 
- Rotate the compartment cover (at the bottom of the toothbrush) counterclockwise to access the USB-C charging port.
- Ensure the port is completely dry before plugging in.
- Blinking mode icons indicate charging is in progress; fully lit icons indicate charging is complete.
- Charging takes ~4 hours. Once done, unplug and rotate the cover clockwise to close.

- Store in a clean, dry place away from direct sunlight.

- Device is only compatible with ZenyumSonic™ Brush Head Refill and ZenyumSonic™ Gentle Clean Brush Head Refill.

services.title: 100% Authentic
services.description: Shopee Mall products are guaranteed 100% authentic, and are sourced directly from brands and authorised distributors. If you receive an inauthentic product, you may request for a 2x refund.

services.title: 15-Day Free Returns
services.description: Free returns can be requested within 15 days from the date of delivery. To qualify for change of mind returns, items must be in original condition, with packaging and labels intact (including free gifts) and safety seals unbroken. Applicable to selected items. T&Cs apply.

services.title: Product Liability Protection
services.description: Protect yourself from adverse effects arising from use/consumption of product
